title: National Tech Day
description: Supported event preparation, participant coordination, and technical arrangements for Libya’s first National Tech Day with the Libyan Information Technology Organization.

title: Robotics Mentor
description: Helped students with teamwork, presentations, basic coding, robotics preparation, and FIRST Tech Challenge competition work.

title: Team Leader
description: Led the Lybotics Asteroids Robotics Team through planning, task distribution, technical problem solving, and competition preparation.

title: Computer Engineering Started
description: Began a Computer Engineering degree at Kocaeli University covering software, systems, algorithms, electronics, and the layers between them.

title: Turkish C1
description: Completed the language stage that made university life and technical study in Türkiye possible.

title: Teknofest Contributor
description: Contributed power-regulation and PCB-layout work to the TAISAT autonomous-vehicle team.

title: CV Bro MVP
description: Turned an internship-search workflow into a company-research, filtering, logging, and outreach-review tool.

title: Game Dev Started
description: Stopped keeping game development as a future plan and began building Imposter, a multilingual social-deduction game.
